Minor'S Compromise On Calendar In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On Sep. 30,2002.
Off Calendar Oct-01-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar this day for hearing on Petition approving compromise of minor's claim. Petitioner represented by and through counsel, Mark E. Burton, Jr., Esq. presents evidence. Good cause appearing, the court grants compromise as follows: Settlement to Danny: $25,000.00 into blocked account at City National Bank, 150 California St., San Francisco, CA 94111. Settlement to Lyndon $25,000.00 in an annuity paid out as follows: $20,000.00 at age 18 and $24,000.00 at age 21. Order signed in open court.
